caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.subtitle: How I've helped businesses like yours achieve measurable growth

studies.name: Velvet Pour
studies.problem: Struggling with 1.2% conversion rate and slow loading times affecting user experience.
studies.solution: Complete store redesign with optimized product pages, improved checkout flow, and performance enhancements.
studies.result: Increased conversion rate to 2.8% and reduced page load time by 45%.

studies.name: De Martini
studies.problem: Mobile traffic converting poorly due to non-responsive design and complicated navigation.
studies.solution: Mobile-first redesign with simplified user journey and touch-optimized interface.
studies.result: Mobile conversions increased by 65% and overall conversion rate improved by 22%.

studies.name: Mister Spare Parts
studies.problem: Low average order value and high cart abandonment rate.
studies.solution: Implemented product bundling, one-click checkout, and abandoned cart email sequences.
studies.result: Average order value increased by 35% and cart abandonment reduced by 28%.
